faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.

placements.overview:
Founded in 1998, IET Group of Institutions is a private institute. It is located in Ropar, Punjab. The institute is accredited with AICTE and CoA. IET Group of Institutions provides UG, PG and After 10th courses in Full Time mode. It provides 38 courses across specialisations such as Agriculture, Aircraft Maintenance Engineering, Chemistry, Civil Engineering and Computer Science Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. IET Group of Institutions fees ranges between INR 46,000 to 3,00,000. The student intake for these courses is 1057. IET Group of Institutions offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Design. IET Group of Institutions offers all the campus facilities to students.

IET Group of Institutions offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the IET Group of Institutions offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fees for IET Group of Institutions courses range between INR 46,000 to 3,00,000.

IET Group of Institutions has well stocked Library, Hostel, Cafeteria, Shuttle Service, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus and Lab facility for its students. Hostel has In-Campus Boys Hostel and Girls Hostel. The Central Library contains over 30331 books besides national, international & E-Journals., Encyclopedias, handbooks, and research proceedings. The library subscribes 68 periodicals of Indian & foreign origin. Central Library operates Welfare Book Bank essentially to meet the need of economically weaker students who can get textbooks issued for the whole semester. The Institute subscribes INDEST-AICTE online Journals. for quality education & research. These resources cover more than 1,260,86 documents from 12,000 publications, including 116 Journals, transactions, Magazines, conference proceedings.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Average college with a nice fee structure .

review_content.Placements: Very low placement percentage with very low packages. Local recruiting companies with very low packages. You must do everything on your own because the syllabus at every college is very outdated. So you should do a side hustle or do something that you need to do .
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is very nice with 4 Wi-Fi in each hostel, and the authority takes good care of the hostel if you need any kind of help like an ambulance, cleanliness, water, electricity, or gym-related. You will be provided with it if it's genuine. If your tubelight breaks down or the fan stops working, it will be corrected within 2-3 hours .

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for the civil engineering course.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our course got placed, and every year a lot of students gets placed according to their skills and percentage. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Nagarjun GP and Hero GP visit our campus for placements. About 50% of the students from our course got an internship. Top roles like site manager and HR are offered to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good Wi-Fi facility. The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides a spacious library and classrooms. Quality of the hostel and the food served in the mess is good. Sports and games are also well-managed. Warden and dean are very helpful with great nature.

reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is good with the lush green campus. Hostel for boys and girls are good and efficient.

review_content.Placements: There no placements for the architecture department. However, they provide internship in many architectural firms. Mostly 50% of students got internships from our college. The highest stipend offered was Rs. 12,000. The lowest stipend offered was Rs. 5,000. There is a placement cell, but for the architecture department.
review_content.Infrastructure: Medical facilities are available here in very well-conditions. The campus and also hostel is equipped with Wi-Fi facility. Labs are very good. Studios and classrooms are very good in conditions. The college provides the best sports and games facilities. All the studios are in good working conditions. Hostels are lucrative, and the food served in the hostel is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: The fee structure of our college is comparatively low.

review_content.Placements: There is no scope for on-campus placements for electrical engineering students. The college invites companies related to the marketing field, and not core companies in which a candidate can start their career and rely on it. The placement cell is of no use when it doesn't have contacts with reputed companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus has a lot of greenery and is located away from busy roads and pollution. The campus has enough green parks and cafeterias for students to hang out. Enough number of blocks are available for all the streams. Labs are well-equipped with the latest technology.

reviews_list.review_title: Poor management, do not play with the future of india.

review_content.Placements: Zero Placements for the architecture course in this college. And Rest of the B.Tech course are comparatively better than B.Arch. As per my knowledge in the past 8 years, no placements had been done in B.Arch course. Only the M. B.A. Students got good placements every year.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is a very nice campus full of greenery and building structures. Hostels and campus buildings are wi-fi active. Punjab is highly heated in summers and None of the classrooms have AC facility. Quality of food in mess is average and quality of food in canteen is a evil from the very beginning. The nearby area is so undeveloped.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Average in case of infrastructure. Poor in case of placements. Hostel life is good.

review_content.Placements: Although I was a topper and had good skills and knowledge, I didn't get any placement from there. Hardly any company visit there for placements. 3-4 students of our batch were placed in GreyB, Chandigarh. Rest of the batch tried for off-campus. I also went into TCS through off-campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is fine. I would rate it 3 out of 5. Cafeteria is not good and transportation facilities are not very good. Sports and games is good. Hostel rooms are 3 out of 5. The food there is not of good quality in hostel mess. Also, the food in cafeteria is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with a nice fee structure .
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very nice with 4 Wi-Fi in each hostel, and the authority takes good care of the hostel if you need any kind of help like an ambulance, cleanliness, water, electricity, or gym-related. You will be provided with it if it's genuine. If your tubelight breaks down or the fan stops working, it will be corrected within 2-3 hours .

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for the civil engineering course.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good Wi-Fi facility. The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides a spacious library and classrooms. Quality of the hostel and the food served in the mess is good. Sports and games are also well-managed. Warden and dean are very helpful with great nature.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good with the lush green campus. Hostel for boys and girls are good and efficient.
reviews.review_text: Medical facilities are available here in very well-conditions. The campus and also hostel is equipped with Wi-Fi facility. Labs are very good. Studios and classrooms are very good in conditions. The college provides the best sports and games facilities. All the studios are in good working conditions. Hostels are lucrative, and the food served in the hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: The fee structure of our college is comparatively low.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus has a lot of greenery and is located away from busy roads and pollution. The campus has enough green parks and cafeterias for students to hang out. Enough number of blocks are available for all the streams. Labs are well-equipped with the latest technology.

reviews.review_heading: Poor management, do not play with the future of india.
reviews.review_text: It is a very nice campus full of greenery and building structures. Hostels and campus buildings are wi-fi active. Punjab is highly heated in summers and None of the classrooms have AC facility. Quality of food in mess is average and quality of food in canteen is a evil from the very beginning. The nearby area is so undeveloped.

reviews.review_heading: Average in case of infrastructure. Poor in case of placements. Hostel life is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is fine. I would rate it 3 out of 5. Cafeteria is not good and transportation facilities are not very good. Sports and games is good. Hostel rooms are 3 out of 5. The food there is not of good quality in hostel mess. Also, the food in cafeteria is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: The best place to make your dreams come true.
reviews.review_text: There is no doubt about the infrastructure of this college. Apart from being away from the main road, there are no other cons about its reachability and the infrastructure. The classrooms and the labs are in the A grade condition. They are managing well. All the college is covered with the greenery.

reviews.review_heading: All in all, this campus is fabulous.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good and is developing at a very fast rate.Here the main is the location of the campus as compare to the other colleges.This place is quite and students enjoy studying here.Different types of sports activities are also done here.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because the faculty are supportive, and average student are capable of getting placed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite nice, and the staff are employed to take care of the same and do their job well. The rooms are properly ventilated and well lit. Annually, many sports events are held such as badminton etc. The canteen provides delicious food. I usually eat at the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The college will be good if it will be handed to good people, otherwise, fate is clear.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi and all the facilities. The infrastructure is the most unused thing in the campus. The Wi-Fi is available on the campus and a lifeline to the student living on the isolated island. For the namesake, everything is available on the campus, the canteen, two Nescafe, and dispensary, gym and even playrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the placement drive.
reviews.review_text:
It is spread over 60 acres of land.
Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games are good but the canteen is not up to the mark.
The quality of the lab is good, especially for the electrical and the mechanical branches.
Good quality of food is available in the canteen. 
The rooms of the hostel are good with proper hygiene and cleaning.
The bathrooms are also cleaned on a daily basis.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but weak placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The full campus is Wi-Fi enabled. All the classrooms are well-equipped with all required facilities. The hostels are in a very good condition. Various canteens are available on the campus with good quality food and affordable price rates. A well-equipped gym is available for both girls' and boys' hostels.

reviews.review_heading: A good institute overall.
reviews.review_text:
The institute is equipped with world class laboratories and apparatus. The facilities offered by the department are: 
The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, a big sports ground, indoor and outdoor, modern classrooms, a cafeteria for quality food and snacks.
The hostel mess also provides good food according to the menu decided by the student committee.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect destination for the upcoming engineers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well- planned and the whole of the campus including the hostel is Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed data. The labs are fully established and all the equipment are in a good condition. A large cafeteria and a canteen is there where students can get quality food and snacks.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at the University of Trans-Disciplinary Health Sciences and Technology are BSc, BVoc, and MSc. The college offers these programmes to students across several specialisations such as Food Process & Technology, Operation Theatre Technology (OTT), etc. Further, the college offers UG-level programmes for a duration of 3 years with a comprehensive curriculum. TDU Bangalore courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry.
The BSc programme offered by the college is highly popular due to its promising career prospects. The University of Trans-Disciplinary Health Sciences and Technology follows an industry-aligned curriculum to help students gain practical knowledge with deep digital insights. paragraphs: Initially, the college was mainly concerned with Ayurveda and Biology streams. At present, the college also provides quality education in the field of Trans-Disciplinary Research and Medicine. At the UG level, the college offers BSc and BVoc programme to students in various specialisations such as Kidney Care Dialysis Technology (KDT) and Food Process & Technology. Further, the college offers MSc programme for students in several specialisations such as Plant Systematics, Good Clinical Management, Bioinformatics & Functional Genomics, etc. The fee for the MSc programme at TDU Bangalore for the batch of 2024-26 ranges between INR 2.2 Lacs and INR 4.5 Lacs for the total duration of the course.

The University of Trans-Disciplinary Health Sciences and Technology courses are offered to students at Undergraduate and Postgraduate levels. These programmes are offered across various disciplines such as Ayurveda, Biology, Trans-Disciplinary Research, and Medicine. At the PG level, the college offers MSc programme for students in several specialisations such as Plant Systematics, Good Clinical Management, Bioinformatics & Functional Genomics, etc. The college offers this programme to students at an affordable fee range, ranging between 2.2 Lacs and 4.5 lakhs.

reviews_list.review_title: Best college with good facilities.

review_content.Placements: The lowest package is 20,000 to 60,000. There are a lot of companies. Drug inspector, clinical research fields, clinical pharmacists, and many others. Internships can be done, and hospital sessions are also conducted. Many top companies are involved.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, and all facilities are available. Weekly presentations, hospital sessions, moral presentations, poster presentations, monographs presentations, and many other programs that we can learn a lot from. Project work is also included, and these are guided by our teachers.

reviews_list.review_title: An average college life at Sri Chaitanya institute of pharmaceutical sciences karimnagar in 2024.

review_content.Placements: I have studied pharmacy at Sri Chaitanya Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences from the year 2020-2024. There were about 5-6 campus and placement drive in our campus and almost 70% from our class got placed. The highest average package offered was 3 LPA and the lowest was 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course were Apollo Pharmacy, Medico, and Omega. There is no internship for this course. The top roles offered for my course are pharmacist, drug inspector, health inspector, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has excellent infrastructure and it is very large. The classrooms are big and well ventilated and we have a separate library that consists of books specifically for our course along with some pharmaceutical journals and magazines. The laboratory, on the other hand, is not well maintained and usually there is a shortage of equipment or some material at all the times and we had to compromise for the experiments or not do the experiments sometimes. There was no college hostel facility but the college hired a nearby hostel as their hostel but we had a canteen and the quality of food provided there was average and comparable. Along with it, we had a dedicated medical room in our cellar for medical emergencies and a sports room too, where the sports equipment is stored.

reviews_list.review_title: Very much satisfied being a part of this college, and blessed to have such helpful faculty.

review_content.Placements: Our batch had the most enthusiastic students. 60% of them are placed in top MNCs like Dr. Reddy's, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, etc., with an average of 4 LPA. Few of them are placed in the role of qualitative analysts. We got internships during the course in top companies located in Hyderabad.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is enabled with free Wi-Fi. The college has good infrastructure. It has a well-maintained library with a huge collection of books and magazines. The classrooms are neat, and the labs are well maintained, which we feel interested in going to. The hostel is well maintained and provides good food. A gym is available. A huge playground is available with a football court, cricket ground, badminton court, and table tennis.

review_content.Placements: Placements are offered to final-year students every year. Companies like Tech Mahindra come for recruitment. Our seniors who have good marks and skills are selected.

They conduct sports meet once every year which is great, the meals we get in the mess are tasteless but still it? highlights.summary: Founded in 2020, Shri Shankaracharya Professional University is a private university. It is located in Bhilai, Chhattisgarh. Shri Shankaracharya Professional University provides UG, PG and Certificate courses in both Full Time and Part Time modes. It provides 45 courses across specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering, Health Information Administration and Nursery Teacher Training (NTT). Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. Shri Shankaracharya Professional University fees ranges between INR 15,000 to 2,80,000. Shri Shankaracharya Professional University offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Design. Shri Shankaracharya Professional University offers all the campus facilities to students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure and faculty members are good, but placements are not really good.

content.Placements: Less than 20% were placed, with the highest package being 1.8 LPA and the lowest I don’t know. Only Patra India came for all courses. Less than 10% do internship. The dream is for a developed career, but instead, I am forced to work as a call center executive. Placements are the worst. If you just want a degree without a job, you can join this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best in Bhilai, with premium labs equipped with Intel i3 11th Gen CPUs. There is Wi-Fi, but it doesn't work, and the lift in our building is broken. Classrooms are quite good, and the library is very big. We get every book from the library, and I haven't purchased any books during my graduation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you are not from Chhattisgarh, don't take admission; it is not that much worth it.

content.Placements: They say there are 100% placements but it totally depends on the skills you have to clear the interview. Google, Samsung, Honda, Lava, HCL, etc. are the top recruitment companies. Assistant engineer, backend developer, frontend developer, etc. are the top roles offered. The highest package is around 20 lacs, and the average package is 5 lacs.
content.Infrastructure: Every daily need for facilities is available in the hostel and, in particular, in every department. Food quality is good, medical facilities like first aid are available, and a sports field is available on campus. Infrastructure is good and it looks green; there are canteens and mess.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shri Shankaracharya Professional University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and faculty members are good, but placements are not really good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in Bhilai, with premium labs equipped with Intel i3 11th Gen CPUs. There is Wi-Fi, but it doesn't work, and the lift in our building is broken. Classrooms are quite good, and the library is very big. We get every book from the library, and I haven't purchased any books during my graduation.

reviews.review_heading: If you are not from Chhattisgarh, don't take admission; it is not that much worth it.
reviews.review_text: Every daily need for facilities is available in the hostel and, in particular, in every department. Food quality is good, medical facilities like first aid are available, and a sports field is available on campus. Infrastructure is good and it looks green; there are canteens and mess.

reviews.review_heading: SSPU a perfect college for management.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. We have air-conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi connectivity available in our classrooms, and a very good auditorium. There are many good opportunities for sports and games. Overall, one can have a decent college life, and the library is also available.

reviews.review_heading: They provide a good opportunity for placements. I researched for college, I saw last year's placemen
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are good, but the hostel is not very good. Medical facilities are also good in sports and games. It is good for new students. Routers are also available. Transportation facilities are also good. The college offers good services and study modes.

reviews.review_heading: You can have fun only if have nice friend group here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great. We have nice computer labs, classrooms and library. Canteen is okay and food is not bad. There is not much facilities in hostel. You have to bring everything of your need you cannot expect that with hostel and yes outing time is only till 6 pm after that you have to take permission from your parents.

reviews.review_heading: SSPU the college is very good but not good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in my college is very good. The college environment is also good. In my college, facility in my college hostel, canteen, medical, sports, and games are also good. In my mess, every day change the food, according to veg and non-veg. Also every day, non-veg and veg also making in my mess.

reviews.review_heading: A bit disappoint because of some faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our faculty members provide good service when it comes to our infrastructure. It has good interior. There is a good library. We have good comfortable classrooms. It's very great for sports and activities. Faculty members also put interest and your needs. As I wanted a sports tournament and they arranged it for us.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good for the student who wants to graduate and enjoy the college life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities which available are good as a normally student want in college and in library all the books are available which are provided by the teachers to study. The labs are also well maintained and the grounds are clean and so many tournament take place in the university.

reviews.review_heading: Firstly come and visit college for your own better review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure is good. Classroom were neat and clean library were so good in library their is so much silence so that you can properly constraints on your reading canteen were so amazing you can chilling with your friends fun to go their amazing .

reviews.review_heading: Shri Shankaracharya Professional University is best college in Bhilai but improve in extra activity.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but poor. Labs are good and library is so good. Classrooms are not good. Hostel is available. Canteen is also available. Sports and games are available but no role to play. Medical facilities are not there but there is one medical college in front of our college.
